titleStmt.title: SII 24.337: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
MALLIKĀRJUNA No. 337. (A.R. No. 92 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of land, by purchase, by Paḷḷikoṇḍa-perumāḷ-Kaṟpūra-Maḻavarāyar for rearing a garden for supply of vegetables and flowers to the god and for the supply of civet ointment. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1378, Dhātu, Mīna, śu. 13, Tuesday, Maghā regularly correspond to A.D. 1457, March 8, Tuesday; f.d.t. ·25, ·85.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleścaran harirāyavipāṭan pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ pūrvvaderaṣṇabhachchima Uttara samudrātipati śrīmanrājātirācaṉ Irājaparameśvaran śrīvirapra tāpateva mallikāchchiṉa tevamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 3 100 7 10 8ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa tātu samvatsarattu mīnañā
pūrvapakṣattu maṅkalavāramum trayodaśiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ teṉ karai pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil śrīraṅganārāyaṇacciyarum Uttamanampiyum Aṉaittukkottu stānikarum paḷḷikoṇṭaperumāḷ kaṟpūramaḻavarāyaṟku śrī cenāpati peruvilai Āka nila vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājaṟku tammuṭaiya taṉmamāka puḻukiṉaiccu U
ṇa m kaṭṭavum tirumālai cāttavum teṅkāyamutu kaṟiyamutu payiṟ(c) ceyyavum tiruṉantavāṉamāka payiṟ ceyya muṉṉāḷ tiruppūmaram teṉṉai maram kiṇaṟu Uṭ(p)paṭa koyilukkuḷ viṟṟa � ttukku Ellai periya śrīmaṭattukkum nāṉmukat tirukkopurattukkum kiḻakku Akaḷaṅkaṉ tirumati(ḷ)ḷukku vaṭakku tirumaṅkai Āḻvār tirumatiḷukku teṟku Aṉuman koyil tiruccuṟṟu toppil matiḷukku teṟku Uṭai
toppu tiruccuṟṟu melai matiḷukkum Akaḷaṅkaṉ tirumatiḷ kiḻai matiḷukku meṟku Āka yinta nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa yirājavipāṭaṉ ku 3 10kku vilai Āṉa ø 8 100 yippaṇam Eṇṇūṟume yintak kuḻi muṉṉūṟum vilai Āvatu Ākavum yinta ø 8 100 m pārvaiyiṭṭu śrīpaṇṭārattile celuttivittukkoṇṭu nila vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom paḷḷikoṇṭaperumāḷ kaṟpūramaḻavarāyaṟ
śrī paṇṭārattile yintak kayiṅkariyam cantirātitta varaiyum cellakkaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.337 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
